'''Koensayr''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region. It was the headquarters of [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr Manufacturing]].<ref name="Strongholds" /> A [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] colony, in addition to industrializing most of the planet, the lower latitudes contain a small, seaside tourism industry, with vibrant colorful sunsets being a standout feature.
